commands.review_summary:
The branch tightens Policy plugin `policy.jsonc` shape validation to reject unsupported sections and rule keys, updates policy docs, and adds focused doctor tests on top of stacked policy conformance changes.

PR surface: Source +4254, Tests +3678, Docs +55. Total +7987 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a config-validation PR rather than a reported runtime bug. The changed behavior is source-checkable in the final commit tests, but real CLI output was not provided.
commands.review_followup: Manual maintainer review is needed because this protected draft changes fail-closed policy validation, depends on an active stack, and needs a policy-schema decision for the tools whitelist gap.

target.title: fix(policy): reject unsupported policy keys
target.body:
## Summary

This is the next stacked Policy follow-up after #87056. It brings policy file shape validation to the same strict bar as the sandbox posture work:

- rejects unsupported top-level policy sections instead of ignoring them
- rejects unsupported nested rule keys across channels, MCP, models, network, ingress, Gateway, agents, tools, sandbox, secrets, auth profiles, and data-handling policy
- documents that unsupported sections or rule keys report `policy/policy-jsonc-invalid`

This is config/policy validation only. It does not add runtime enforcement.

## Stack note

This branch is currently opened against `main` for GitHub visibility, but the reviewable change is the final commit:

- `c6b6696f2c6 fix(policy): reject unsupported policy keys`

It is stacked after the active policy line, including #85572, #85744, #86768, and #87056.

## Verification

- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.ts extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts docs/cli/policy.md`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_FS_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/openclaw-policy-shape7 OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/policy/src/doctor/register.test.ts extensions/policy/src/cli.test.ts -- --reporter=dot --testTimeout=30000`
- `pnpm tsgo:extensions`
- `pnpm docs:check-mdx docs/cli/policy.md`
- `node scripts/run-bundled-extension-oxlint.mjs`
- `git diff --check`
- `~/.codex/skills/codex-review/scripts/codex-review --mode local`
